notes: A thin wrapper file (186 lines, no sorries, no set_option maxHeartbeats) that packages the underlying Differential.lean series `F.invariantDiff` into a typed structure and proves Silverman IV.4.2–4.3. All proofs are short (≤12 lines), delegating the heavy lifting to Differential.lean lemmas (`invariantDiff_chain`, `dX_at_zero_mul_invariantDiff`, etc.). Four declarations are unused within this file but serve as API for downstream files (`Logarithm.lean`, `CharP.lean`).
